# llms.txt — placeholder

This file is reserved for LLM-readable site instructions per the
emerging llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org). It will be
populated in F21 (Seeker web surface) per F01 spec FR-33.

For now: nothing here. Spyglass is in private development;
unauthorized scraping or model-training use is not permitted.

When populated, expect a brief site overview, key navigation
pointers, and a description of what the public surface offers
(landing, signup, Clerk-hosted profile — no product dashboard;
the seeker product is the conversation, not a webpage).
